Dashboard.title: Administrative Management System
Dashboard.description: Administrative records management system for Practice Pedagogical School
Dashboard.welcome: Welcome! Here is an overview of the administrative management system.

AuthSchema.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
AuthSchema.usernameRegex: Only letters, numbers and underscores are allowed
AuthSchema.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

UserManagement.title: User Management
UserManagement.description: Manage accounts and permissions for staff and teachers.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete user "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

toast.error: An error occurred, please try again.

DeviceReport.title: Device Report Management
DeviceReport.description: Track and manage device repair requests in the school.

form.imagePlaceholder: Select or drag & drop an image

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete report #{id}? This action cannot be undone.

toast.error: An error occurred, please try again.

workflow.receiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to receive this report?
workflow.resultDescription: Select repair result and enter notes (optional)
workflow.confirmDescription: The device has been repaired. Please check and confirm the device status.

LeaveRequest.title: Leave Management
LeaveRequest.description: Manage and approve leave requests for staff and teachers

dialog.createDescription: Fill in the information to create a new leave request
dialog.rejectDescription: Are you sure you want to reject this request?
dialog.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this leave request? This action cannot be undone.
dialog.signDescription: Enter your signature PIN to sign this leave request
dialog.approveDescription: Enter your signature PIN to confirm approval of this leave request

toast.pdfError: Error downloading PDF, please try again
toast.signError: Signing failed. Please check your PIN
toast.error: An error occurred, please try again

Settings.title: Account Settings
Settings.description: Manage your personal information and account security
Settings.personalInfoDescription: Update your basic information so people can recognize you.
Settings.avatarInvalidType: Please select a valid image file
Settings.changePasswordDescription: Ensure your account is secured with a strong password.
Settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
Settings.saveError: An error occurred while saving changes

DigitalSignature.title: Personal Signature Management
DigitalSignature.description: Set up the display image and security for your digital signature on electronic documents.

draw.label: Signature Drawing Area
draw.placeholder: Use mouse or drawing tablet to sign

upload.label: Upload Signature Image
upload.hint: Drag & drop or click to select a signature image file

guide.title: Guidelines
guide.tip1: Sign within the frame for the best display on documents.
guide.tip2: Use clear strokes, avoid very thin or broken lines.
guide.tip3: The system will automatically remove background for uploaded images.

pin.title: Signature PIN Code
pin.warning: Note: PIN is used to authenticate each document signing. Do not share your PIN with others.

toast.error: An error occurred, please try again
toast.noSignatureData: Please draw or upload a signature image
toast.invalidFile: Please select a valid image file (PNG, JPG)

AgeStatistics.title: Age Statistics of Staff
AgeStatistics.description: Data updated based on the centralized human resource management system
AgeStatistics.insightsDesc: The personnel structure is mainly concentrated in the golden age ({ageRange}). This is an experienced resource in its highest contribution phase for the school.
AgeStatistics.forecastDesc: The ratio of young staff (under 30) needs to be focused on for recruitment in the upcoming period to ensure continuous succession for all educational levels.
